title: 有馬記念の後に・ファイナルアプローチ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun emerges victorious at the Arima
Kinen. As promised, I tell her that she twinkled
brighter than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After finally hearing the words she has wanted to
hear more than anything, tears of happiness pour
down her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the ceremony commemorating Narita Brian's
final race approaches, Mayano Top Gun selfishly
pleads with her to continue racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having grown into a truly brilliant racer, she
ultimately manages to keep Narita Brian from
retiring.
